title: Allow Text Formatting in Update Replies (Bold, Italics, Lists, etc.)
excerpt:
Hi everyone! :waving_hand: 
I’d love to see the ability to format text in replies to updates — just like we can in the main update text field. Right now, replies are limited to plain text, which makes it hard to highligh…

posts.author: Debora (Debora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!
I’d love to see the ability to format text in replies to updates — just like we can in the main update text field. Right now, replies are limited to plain text, which makes it hard to highlight key information, structure longer responses, or make communication more effective.

Screenshot 2025-07-04 alle 09.41.511654×478 30 KB

Screenshot 2025-07-04 alle 09.43.441596×538 18.4 KB

Having basic formatting options (like bold, italic, bullet points, links, etc.) would greatly improve readability and collaboration, especially in teams where updates and replies are used heavily for ongoing project communication.

If you also find this feature useful, please give this request a vote!

posts.author: FrikPR (Frik vC)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is one of the biggest annoyances for us, ever. Our initial Updates being done on a board item, contain different text formatting, images, colored text and even highlighted text… Sadly in the replies on those, we can’t do the same. Heck, we can’t even do basic bullet points, which is also something we very generally do.
I really hope they change this.
